event.description:
Scala By the Bay Late Bird registration (http://scala.bythebay.io)is in progress.

Jakob Odersky, Jason Swartz, Stewart Stewart, the all-star Scala developer crew of SF Scala, will teach an intro to Scala to get up up to speed for SBTB and beyond.

We have heard you -- we need to start with the basics of Scala from the ground up for a lot of good folks out there just figuring it out.

-- Come and teach it
-- Come and learn it

The veterans of SF Scala with experience of applying Scala in industry will teach the course. If you can be a TA, please raise your hand in the comments.

This comprehensive and compressed Scala overview is a perfect way to party before Scala By the Bay (http://Scala.bythebay.io) the next day. Refresh your understanding of Scala; or come and learn it and be ready to absorb all the talks at a higher level.

To offset the late bird in effect at SBTB, use the code SFSCALA20 for 20% off all remaining registrations (http://scala.bythebay.io/tickets.html).
event.title: Introduction to Scala Bootcamp
